zh.lifeSummary: 當Ida de Boulogne於大約1045年出生在法國帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅時，她的父親Eustache II de Boulogne27歲，母親Ide de Lorraine17歲。她和Hermann van Malsen-Cuijk至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1106年享年62歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ida
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Norman name, of Germanic origin, derived from īd ‘work’. This died out during the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, influenced by its use in Tennyson's The Princess ( 1847 ) for the central character, who devotes herself to the cause of women's rights and women's education in a thoroughly Victorian way. The name is also associated with Mount Ida in Crete, which was connected in classical times with the worship of Zeus, king of the gods, who was supposed to have been brought up in a cave on the mountainside. In the 1930s it became famous as the name of the film star Ida Lupino ( 1914–1995 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Ida de Boulogne was born about 1045, in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Eustache II de Boulogne, was 27 and her mother, Ide de Lorraine, was 17. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Hermann van Malsen-Cuijk. She died in 1106, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ida de Boulogne est née environ 1045, à Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Eustache II de Boulogne, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Ide de Lorraine, avait 17 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Hermann van Malsen-Cuijk. Elle est décédée en 1106, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ida de Boulogne um 1045 in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Eustache II de Boulogne 27 und ihre Mutter Ide de Lorraine 17. Sie hatte mit Hermann van Malsen-Cuijk mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1106 im Alter von 62 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ida de Boulogne è nata il circa 1045 nel Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Eustache II de Boulogne, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Ide de Lorraine, aveva 17 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Hermann van Malsen-Cuijk. Morì nel 1106, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ida de Boulogneが約1045年にフランスプアス-デ-カレイスボウログネ-スル-マーで生まれた時，父Eustache II de Boulogneは27歳，母Ide de Lorraineは17歳であった。彼女はHermann van Malsen-Cuijkとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1106年に62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ida de Boulogne(이)가 대략 1045년 프랑스 파스-데-캘레이 부로그니-수-머에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Eustache II de Boulogne(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ide de Lorraine(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 Hermann van Malsen-Cuijk(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1106년 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ida de Boulogne nasceu aproximadamente 1045, em Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Eustache II de Boulogne, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Ide de Lorraine, tinha 17 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Hermann van Malsen-Cuijk. Ela faleceu em 1106, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ida de Boulogne родилась около 1045 г. в местности боулогне-сур-мир, пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Eustache II de Boulogne было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Ide de Lorraine, 17. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Hermann van Malsen-Cuijk. Она умерла в 1106 г. в возрасте 62 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Hermann van Malsen-Cuijk. Murió en 1106, a la edad de 62 años.
